home.metaTitle: Vero Esqueda · Professional food photography · Mexico City
home.metaDescription: Professional food photography, culinary art direction, and hybrid photo + CGI + AI production. Sony Alpha Partner, 15+ years, international judge. Mexico City · global reach.

hero.title: Photography that makes the food sell itself.
hero.subtitle: Sony Alpha Partner. Culinary art direction and hybrid photo + CGI + AI production for restaurants, chains and brands that can't afford mediocre images.
hero.imageAlt: Editorial food photograph by Vero Esqueda

problem.headline: Your food is incredible. Your photos don't say so.
problem.body: Your customer decides in less than three seconds whether to walk into your restaurant or scroll to the next one. That decision is made by the photo. Not by the taste.

visualProof.headline: The image is the argument.
visualProof.itemAlt: Food photograph by Vero Esqueda — piece {n}

stats.headline: The right photo sells. The data is on the table.

menu.body: Average increase in orders when a digital menu uses professional photography vs. amateur.

social.body: Higher social engagement for restaurants that publish consistent editorial photography.

delivery.body: Of delivery users say the photo is the #1 factor when picking a new restaurant.

stats.sourcesNote: Industry reference figures (Toast, Hootsuite, DoorDash). We validate every number with you before using it in your campaigns.

authority.headline: You're not hiring someone who learned on YouTube.
authority.intro: Verónica Esqueda has spent more than fifteen years making food look the way it tastes. Not just photographing — directing, styling, judging, and teaching other photographers how to do it right.
authority.imageAlt: Editorial portrait of Verónica Esqueda on set

hybrid.headline: The differentiator almost no one in LATAM can offer.
hybrid.intro: We pair Vero's real photography with CGI and generative tooling to cut production costs, iterate infinite variants and stage scenes that simply can't be captured on camera.

variants.title: Infinite variants
variants.body: Multiple takes of the same dish without a reshoot — different backdrops, seasons, plating.

impossible.title: Impossible scenes
impossible.body: Giant dishes, floating ingredients, atmospheres that would cost a fortune to shoot in studio.

consistency.title: Brand consistency
consistency.body: Same light and palette across campaigns, even months apart.

speed.title: Faster turnaround
speed.body: Seasonal menus and tactical campaigns without scheduling another shoot day.

services.headline: Three ways to work with Vero.
services.intro: Each package scales by menu size, production days and post-production depth. Personalized quote within 24 h.

photo.name: Professional photography
photo.body: Full food and beverage shoot with styling included. Optional CGI + AI add-on for extended campaigns.

web.name: Web + organic SEO
web.body: A landing page on the level of the one you're seeing, with our own SEO framework so your business ranks on Google without depending on ads.

academy.name: Academy membership
academy.body: Monthly subscription with HOW TOs on photography, styling, generative AI applied to food and prompt engineering.

workshops.name: Workshops and talks
workshops.body: In-person and online training for creative teams, brands and schools.

faq.headline: What we get asked the most before we start.

price.q: How much does a session cost?
price.a: It depends on the number of dishes, production days and post-production depth. Personalized quote in less than 24 h after the briefing.

location.a: We work in Mexico City — studio or your location. For shoots out of town, transparent travel costs are added to the proposal.

rights.q: Who owns the rights to the images?
rights.a: You get a clear, documented usage license. Vero retains authorship and may show the work in her portfolio unless an explicit NDA applies.

delivery.a: 7–10 business days for standard photography. Hybrid productions with CGI or AI are scoped case by case.

revisions.q: How many revision rounds are included?
revisions.a: Two rounds of editorial retouching on the final selection. Creative-direction changes are discussed in pre-production.

travel.q: Do you travel for on-site production?
travel.a: Yes. We've produced across LATAM, the US and Europe. We coordinate travel and permits.

cgi.q: Do you offer CGI or AI as a standalone service?
cgi.a: Yes. If you already have photography and need to extend a campaign with generative variants or CGI, we can add that layer.

membership.q: How does the Academy membership work?
membership.a: Monthly subscription with access to new tutorials weekly, prompt templates and live sessions with Vero. Cancel anytime.

finalCta.headline: Let's turn your menu into a reason to walk in.
finalCta.body: Tell us what you need. We reply in less than 24 hours with an initial plan and budget ranges.
finalCta.ctaWhatsappAria: Start a WhatsApp conversation with Vero Esqueda
finalCta.formNote: Smart form with automated follow-up coming soon. For now, write to us directly.
